summary: Iteration 66 testing complete - All 9 features verified. TestimonialsManager drag-and-drop reordering, eye-icon visibility toggle, SectionOrderManager padlock (login_required) toggle, public settings login_required exposure, HomePage login_required behavior, and global CSS word-break rules all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: TestimonialsManager.js: Uses dnd-kit for drag-and-drop with GripVertical handles, persists order via PUT /api/admin/testimonials/{id}
TestimonialsManager.js: Eye icon toggle for visibility works correctly, visible=false items filtered from public API
SectionOrderManager.js: Padlock icon (Lock/LockOpen) toggles login_required independently from Eye (enabled) toggle
HomePage.js: Correctly checks sec.login_required and user object with fallback (user.id || user.member_id || user.username || user.email)
index.css: Global word-break rules applied to main/section/footer text elements (word-break: normal, overflow-wrap: break-word, hyphens: none)
seed_data_creation: Temporarily set aurex_pricing.login_required=true for testing, then reset to false
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 tested: (1) TestimonialsManager drag-and-drop with GripVertical handles - 5 drag handles found, order persists via PUT, (2) TestimonialsManager eye-icon visibility toggle - 5 toggles found, visible=false filtered from public API, (3) SectionOrderManager padlock icon - 16 padlock buttons found for Aurex theme, toggles login_required independently, (4) Public settings returns sections[key].login_required correctly, (5) HomePage hides sections with login_required=true from anonymous users, shows to logged-in users, (6) Eye and Padlock are independent: enabled=false hides from everyone, enabled=true+login_required=false is public, enabled=true+login_required=true is members-only, (7) Global CSS word-break rules verified on main p, main h2, section p, footer p elements, (8) User object detection uses fallback (id/member_id/username/email), (9) Auth /me endpoint returns user with identifiers.

testimonials_drag_drop.drag_handles: PASS - 5 GripVertical drag handles found in TestimonialsManager
testimonials_drag_drop.public_sorted: PASS - GET /api/public/testimonials returns sorted by order ascending

section_login_required.toggle_works: PASS - Clicking padlock toggles login_required state (amber=locked, gray=unlocked)

public_settings_login_required.settings_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/public/settings returns sections with login_required field
public_settings_login_required.sections_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/public/sections returns sections with login_required

homepage_login_required_behavior.anonymous_hidden: PASS - Pricing section NOT in DOM for anonymous users when login_required=true
homepage_login_required_behavior.logged_in_visible: PASS - Pricing section visible for logged-in admin when login_required=true

eye_padlock_independence.enabled_true_login_true: PASS - Section visible only to logged-in members
eye_padlock_independence.enabled_false: PASS - Section hidden from everyone regardless of login_required

global_css_word_break.main_h2: PASS - word-break: normal, overflow-wrap: break-word, hyphens: none

global_css_word_break.footer_p: PASS - word-break: normal, overflow-wrap: break-word, hyphens: none
